globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.reviewsolicitors.co.uk; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.reviewsolicitors.co.uk; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://api.web3forms.com https://www.reviewsolicitors.co.uk; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' https://api.web3forms.com; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), interest-cohort=()
